candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash only, narrower than cash and cash equivalents.
Semantically relevant but appears supplemental/blank in preview versus the clearly populated main line.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents row over cash-only or supplemental labels.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current financing liabilities; excludes leases and is a clean current debt total.
Same semantic meaning but appears unpopulated in preview; less preferred than the populated lowercase variant.
Could represent current maturities of long-term debt, but appears supplemental/unpopulated and would be secondary to a clean current debt total.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current interest-bearing debt total. Excluded lease liability (current) per STD rule and avoided component duplication.

candidates.why: Best available current taxes payable/current tax liability line on the balance sheet.
Exact semantic match for taxes payable, but appears unpopulated in preview; kept as secondary option.
Tax receivable asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: Using the explicit current tax liability row. A more exact payable label exists but appears blank in preview; the selected label is still the clearest reported balance-sheet match.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet proxy for property, plant and equipment; under IFRS this commonly corresponds to PPE net/book value.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.

variables.notes: No explicit 'Property, plant and equipment' total is shown; 'Tangible assets' is the best balance-sheet equivalent and likely represents net PPE.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.
Equal by accounting identity but not the assets-side label preferred for AT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit assets-side total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow/net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Exact cash flow statement operating cash flow line.
